userStories.title: BUG-1: Add Modelo 202 (IS pago fraccionado) to all IS-subject profiles
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE modelo_aeat='202' AND verified=true"); echo "M202 profiles: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 6 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: BUG-2: Separate catalogue tool from profile obligations tool
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_tool_layer_separation.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: BUG-3: Fix evidence_notice conflict - obligation verified vs form completeness
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_evidence_notice_separation.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/modelos/aeat/289 | jq 'has("obligation_context")' | grep true && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: BUG-4: Calendar tool must use structured periodicidad data, not semantic search
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_calendario_trimestral.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && curl -sf "http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/perfil/sociedad_valores/obligaciones/calendario/2026-Q3" | jq 'length' | awk '{if ($1>=2) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL: only " $1 " obligations in Q3"}' || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add plazo_descripcion to all obligations missing it
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE periodicidad IN ('mensual','trimestral','semestral','anual') AND plazo_descripcion IS NULL"); echo "Missing plazo: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -eq 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - routing and calendar checks
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint G complete
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && curl -sf "http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/perfil/sociedad_valores/obligaciones/calendario/2026-Q3" | jq 'length' | awk '{if ($1>=2) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL"}' || echo FAIL
